'''Klin Anwa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Silika]] and the brother of [[Kenta Anwa]], who had been defeated by [[Dannen Lifehold]] in the [[Contest]], a [[Silika water]] drinking game. Klin and a group of Silika friends saved Lifehold's life when he was assaulted by [[Linkaas]]' thugs [[Chokk (Bloxian)|Chokk]] and [[Bakk]]. Klin asked for nothing in return, other than being allowed to take a picture with his [[Holocamera/Legends|holocamera]] of the great Silika water champion, Dannen Lifehold.

*{{JournalCite|1|Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold}} {{1st}}
